title: Diversibipalium duplalaticlavium Sola & Sluys 2023, sp. nov.
author: Solà, Eduard
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Diversibipalium duplalaticlavium  Solà & Sluys, sp. nov.    Material : Holotype, RMNH.VER.21029.a (field number RS580), Bod Tai, limestone outcrop near Sukau, Kinabatangan Valley, Sabah, Malaysian Borneo, 5°31’40.8’’N 118°13’19.2’’E, 13April 2016, coll. Kasper Hendriks, Leonel Herrera Alsina and Giacomo Alciatore. A prepharyngeal piece was cut off and used for DNA extraction for molecular phylogenetic analyses. At this moment, histological sections of this animal are unavailable and, thus, there is no information on the anatomy of the reproductive apparatus.
